mapper.sql: select id, perm_id, perm_name, perm_code, perm_type, parent_id, path, status, create_time, update_time, memo from cms_permission
mapper.select: where status = 1 and id in (select perm_id from cms_role_permission where role_id in (select role_id from cms_user_role where user_id = #{userId})) order by perm_type, perm_id
mapper.insert: insert into cms_permission (perm_id, perm_name, perm_code, perm_type, parent_id, path, status, create_time, update_time, memo) values (#{permId}, #{permName}, #{permCode}, #{permType}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{memo})
mapper.select: select count(1) from cms_permission where parent_id = #{permissionId}
